name: Luis Elizondo
summary: Author and former Department of Defense official who testified at the November 2024 House UAP hearing.
profileStatus: Former official, public witness, and disclosure advocate
profileSummary: Former Department of Defense official who testified publicly about alleged secret UAP programs, oversight concerns, and protections for people reporting UAP information.
background: Former Department of Defense official and author.
inclusionNote: Included because of public congressional testimony, an official written statement, and testimony concerning whistleblowers and alleged retaliation.
